issue_title: [@threlte/extras] Fix: interactivity `pointerMissed` fires multiple times per click event
issue_body_preview: Fixes an issue with `pointerMissed`. I've also set up our `@threlte/test` infrastructure for the extras package and have begun adding tests for `interactivity()`.
test_description_zh: 在使用 threlte 的 3D 场景中，启用 interactivity 插件后，点击场景中没有可交互对象的空白区域，观察 pointerMissed 事件的触发次数。
expected_result_zh: 每次点击空白区域时，pointerMissed 事件应仅触发一次，而不是多次触发。
